value.description: +2 to one ability score of choice.

value.name: Darkvision
value.description: Half-orcs can see in the dark up to 60 ft.

value.name: Orc Blood
value.description: Counts as both human and orc for any effect related to race.

value.name: Orc Ferocity
value.description: Once per day, when brought below 0 HP but not killed, can fight on for one more round as if disabled.

value.name: Weapon Familiarity
value.description: Proficient with greataxes and falchions; treat any weapon with 'orc' in name as martial.
